title: Dyes Port
body:
## Dyes Port

Port of new dye textures from Bedrock preview 1.21.110.20.

This resource pack is for Minecraft Java 1.20.2+, but will probably work on older versions too.

Also available on CurseForge

[![Download on curseforge](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/labeled/curseforge@3x.png?raw=true)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/dyes-port)
